faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most commonly asked questions about our services, processes, and technical topics.

items.a: We offer web development, mobile app development, UI/UX design, cloud solutions, e-commerce, SEO optimization, and digital transformation consulting services.
We actively use React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS, Azure, and many other modern technologies in our projects.

items.q: How long does it take to complete a project?
items.a: Depending on scope, simple websites take 2-4 weeks, mid-scale projects 1-3 months, and large-scale projects 3-6 months.
Yes, the initial meeting and project analysis are free. We listen to your needs and provide a custom solution proposal and quote.
Yes, all our projects are developed as responsive. We ensure perfect display on mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.

items.q: Is SEO optimization included in your service?
items.a: Yes, basic SEO optimization is included in all our web projects. Technical SEO, page speed optimization, meta tags, and structured data are applied as standard.

items.q: Can you redesign my existing website?
items.a: Yes, we can redesign and develop your existing site with modern technologies. We ensure a smooth transition without data loss.

items.q: Do you provide hosting and domain services?
items.a: Hosting infrastructure setup and management are among our services. We deploy your site on AWS, Vercel, or your preferred platform.
We typically apply a payment plan of 40% upfront, 30% mid-delivery, and 30% on project delivery. Installment options are also available.
Yes, we offer 3 months of free technical support and maintenance for all projects. Monthly or annual maintenance packages are available afterwards.

items.q: How can I track the project progress?
items.a: We work with Agile/Scrum methodology. You can transparently track your project through weekly sprint meetings and demo presentations.
